content:
The 6529 NFT Fund's goal is to 'collect top pieces across all categories: PFPs (profile pictures), Generative Art, 1 of 1 art and photography' according to Punk6529.

Experience the 6529 Fund SZN1 Gallery

Collection highlights include a Zombie CryptoPunk, two The Lost Robbies, Post Debt by XCOPY...the 16th token ever minted on SuperRare, a whole bag of Chromie Squiggles, some rare and attractive profile pictures from the Bored Ape Yacht Club, Azuki and CloneX, plus a powerful commentary through art on the war in Ukraine and Putin.

A lot has happened in three months and this is just the beginning.
